headline: What if cross-room connections had traffic signals?
body: Busy lanes could have traffic lights — green for high-trust tiles, yellow for review, red for quarantine. plato-dcs coordinates state across rooms. deadband-protocol is the signal logic. A self-regulating fleet that slows traffic during storms and opens full throttle in calm seas.
fleet_relevance: We have all the parts. plato-dcs for consensus. deadband-protocol for rules. We just need the intersection design.
actionable: Model a three-state traffic signal for room-to-room tile flow
Simulate with two rooms and a shared deadband gate
